metadata.title: Tabor — The Bible, place by place
metadata.description: Read the Bible while an interactive map shows, in real time, where each passage takes place.
metadata.chapterDescription: “{snippet}” — {book} {chapter}, with an interactive map of the places in the passage.
metadata.bookDescription: {book}: {count, plural, one {# chapter} other {# chapters}}. Read each chapter alongside an interactive map of biblical places.

search.label: Search the Bible
search.placeholder: Search: Mt 5, Jericho, “light of the world”…
search.resultsAnnouncement: {count, plural, =0 {No results} one {# result} other {# results}}

home.lede: Read the sacred text while a map travels with you, showing where each passage unfolds in its real setting.

now.title: What you'll find today
now.body: The complete text of the 73 books of the Catholic canon in two public-domain versions (Biblia Platense / Straubinger in Spanish, Catholic Public Domain Version in English). An interactive map with 1,335 biblical places synchronized with the reading, search by reference, place, or free text, and reading plans to keep a steady pace. Coming soon: bookmarks and personal notes.

rigor.title: Doctrinal rigor
rigor.body: Only approved versions and verified notes.

calm.title: Aesthetic calm
calm.body: No ads, no gamification, no dark patterns.

privacy.title: Privacy by design
privacy.body: Your data is yours. Optional account, anonymous telemetry.

auth.title: Your Tabor account
auth.lede: With an account, your bookmarks follow you on any device. Reading doesn't require one: it's optional.

errors.userExists: An account with that email already exists.
errors.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.deleteWarning: Your account and all your bookmarks will be deleted immediately and permanently. This cannot be undone.
auth.bookmarksLede: Your bookmarked verses, in reading order.
auth.bookmarksEmpty: You haven't bookmarked any verses yet. In the reader, tap a verse number to bookmark it.
auth.notesLede: Your personal notes, in reading order. They are private: only you can see them.
auth.notesEmpty: You haven't written any notes yet. In the reader, tap a verse's text and choose "Add note".
auth.exportLede: Download all your personal data (bookmarks, highlights, notes, and plan progress) anytime. It's yours.

plans.title: Reading plans
plans.lede: Guided journeys through the Bible: a few chapters each day, at your own pace. Progress is saved on this device.

footer.copy: © {year} Tabor Project — open source under Apache 2.0.

reader.noPlacesBody: This chapter doesn't reference specific places in the text.
reader.overviewBadge: Overview map — this chapter doesn't reference specific places

books.title: Bible
books.lede: Seventy-three books in Catholic liturgical order. Pick one to open its chapter index.
